infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UNHINGED GO needs access to your photos, which may contain faces, to send them to OpenAI for AI-powered roast analysis.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: UNHINGED GO needs camera access to take selfies, which may contain faces, to send them to OpenAI for AI-powered roast analysis.
